However it is not for exclusion of others. Course instructor: Acharya Veeranarayana Pandurangi Dean of Vedanta Faculty, Karnataka Samskrit University, Bengaluru Course Fee: Rs 3000 only or Rs 10000 in the case of people from other nations. About Muktivada Muktivada of Gadadhara Bhattacharya is an independent work that discusses the nature of liberation according to Nyaya school. Gadadhara Bhattacharya is well known for his logical vigour and clarity of analysis.
